description: Using Oracle SQL Developer (already connected to the HR schema), create a PL/SQL stored procedure called GIVE_DEPARTMENT_RAISE. The procedure should accept a department ID and a raise percentage as input parameters, and an OUT parameter for the number of employees affected. It should increase the salary of all employees in the specified department by the given percentage. After creating and compiling the procedure, test it by executing it for the IT department (department_id 60) with a 10% raise.
